vocab.example: How would you describe the company culture here?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn sẽ mô tả văn hoá công ty ở đây như thế nào?

vocab.meaning_vi: quy trình hoà nhập nhân viên mới
vocab.example: Is there an onboarding process for new employees?
vocab.example_vi: Có quy trình hoà nhập cho nhân viên mới không?

vocab.meaning_vi: đánh giá hiệu suất làm việc
vocab.example: We do a performance review every six months.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi đánh giá hiệu suất làm việc mỗi sáu tháng.

vocab.example: Could you tell me about the team structure?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn có thể cho tôi biết về cơ cấu đội nhóm không?

vocab.example: What are the next steps after this interview?
vocab.example_vi: Bước tiếp theo sau buổi phỏng vấn này là gì?

vocab.example: What does a typical day look like in this role?
vocab.example_vi: Một ngày điển hình trong công việc này diễn ra như thế nào?

vocab.example: Is there an opportunity for growth in this position?
vocab.example_vi: Vị trí này có cơ hội phát triển không?

vocab.example: We'll follow up with you by email within a week.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi sẽ liên lạc lại với bạn qua email trong vòng một tuần.

listening.title: Asking the interviewer questions at the end

lines.speaker: Tuan (interviewer)
lines.text: That's all my questions. Do you have any questions for me?

lines.speaker: Linh (candidate)
lines.text: Yes, I do. Could you tell me about the team structure I'd be joining?

lines.speaker: Tuan (interviewer)
lines.text: Sure, you'd work in a team of five developers and one team lead.

lines.speaker: Linh (candidate)
lines.text: Thanks. What does a typical day look like in this role?

lines.speaker: Tuan (interviewer)
lines.text: You'd start with a stand-up, then focus on your tasks for the day.

lines.speaker: Linh (candidate)
lines.text: I see. How would you describe the company culture, and is there an onboarding process?

lines.speaker: Tuan (interviewer)
lines.text: We're quite relaxed and value mutual respect. Onboarding takes about two weeks with a mentor.

lines.speaker: Linh (candidate)
lines.text: Good to know. Is there an opportunity for growth in this position?

lines.speaker: Tuan (interviewer)
lines.text: Definitely, we do a performance review every six months for promotions.

lines.speaker: Linh (candidate)
lines.text: Perfect. One last thing — what are the next steps after this interview?

lines.speaker: Tuan (interviewer)
lines.text: We'll follow up with you by email within a week.

questions.q: What does Linh ask about first?
How long does the onboarding process take?
How often does the company do performance reviews?

shadowing: Could you tell me more about the team structure I would be joining?
What does a typical day look like for someone in this role?
How would you describe the company culture here compared to other places?
Is there a clear onboarding process to help new employees settle in?
What are the next steps in the hiring process after today's interview?
